title: D601 4G 6-Channel Dual-SIM Smart Vehicle Terminal
metaTitle: D601 4G 6-Channel AI Dashcam Terminal | Multi-Channel Video Surveillance
metaDesc: D601 smart vehicle terminal supports 6-channel AHD + 1-channel IPC cameras, 4G全网通/5G optional, GPS/Beidou dual-mode positioning, DMS/ADAS/BSD intelligent driving assistance systems.
fullDescription: The D601 is a professional-grade 4G intelligent vehicle video terminal supporting 6-channel AHD HD video recording and 1-channel IPC network camera (optional). Featuring H.265 efficient video encoding, 4G/5G (optional), GPS/Beidou/GLONASS multi-mode positioning with RTK high-precision positioning (optional). Built-in NPU with 3.0T computing power supports DMS driver behavior analysis, ADAS advanced driving assistance, and BSD blind spot detection. Compliant with JT/T794/808/1076/1078 ministerial protocols, supports OTA remote upgrades, 9-36V wide voltage input with comprehensive circuit protection.
features: Multi-channel Video: Supports 6-channel AHD + 1-channel IPC (optional), 6-channel synchronous recording
HD Quality: H.265/H.264 encoding for ultra-clear video recording
Ministerial Protocol: Compliant with JT/T794/808/1076/1078 standards
Dual SIM: 2 TF card slots, up to 512GB per slot
Multi-mode Positioning: GPS/Beidou/GLONASS with RTK high-precision positioning (optional)
Intelligent Driving: DMS/ADAS/BSD intelligent driving assistance systems
Wide Voltage Input: 9-36V design with undervoltage/short circuit/reverse connection protection

parameters.label: Storage
parameters.value: 2 TF card slots, up to 512GB per slot

packaging: 1x D601 Main Unit, 1, 1xSIM, 1x Power Cable,  1x 4G Antenna, 1x GPS Antenna, 1x Accessory Kit
